extortion.description: Continuum India is a contract research organization specializing in drug safety monitoring and regulatory services for the pharmaceutical industry. They offer a range of services including pharmacovigilance, evidence evaluation, and technology solutions, aimed at enhancing patient safety and ensuring regulatory compliance. Their target clients include globally recognized brands in the healthcare sector, for whom they provide integrated, high-performance services across various therapeutic areas. With a commitment to excellence and the use of cutting-edge technology, including AI and automation, they focus on delivering accurate and timely results for their partners. Employees: 250 Revenue: $14 Million Industry: Retail   Phone Number: (203) 274-0016
